headline: Smucker (SJM) Target Trimmed by Deutsche Bank amid Sector Headwinds
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) is included among the 14 Safest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 30, Deutsche Bank lowered its price recommendation on The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) to $97 from $117 and kept a Hold rating on the shares. The firm said it is seeing “legitimate and widespread pressures building” […]
